sharing applies to a partial list of drugs. 
If only a limited number of drugs on the tier are covered during the gap, then this value will be “Y”. If 
all drugs on the tier are covered through the gap, then this value will be “N”. 
Applies only to enhanced plans with gap coverage. The total submitted charges on the claim (sum of 
all line-level submitted charges, variable called LINE_SBMTD_CHRG_AMT).
